testcase.name: test_today_vs_yesterday_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:41: in test_today_vs_yesterday_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_today_vs_yesterday_structure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:47: in test_today_vs_yesterday_structure assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_today_data_fields
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:64: in test_today_data_fields assert field in today, f"Missing field 'today.{field}'" E AssertionError: Missing field 'today.sales' E assert 'sales' in {}

testcase.name: test_yesterday_data_fields
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:75: in test_yesterday_data_fields assert field in yesterday, f"Missing field 'yesterday.{field}'" E AssertionError: Missing field 'yesterday.sales' E assert 'sales' in {}

testcase.name: test_change_percentages
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:86: in test_change_percentages assert field in change, f"Missing field 'change.{field}'" E AssertionError: Missing field 'change.sales' E assert 'sales' in {}

testcase.name: test_ocr_scan_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing image, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:99: in test_ocr_scan_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for missing image, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing image, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ocr_scan_accepts_base64_image

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [200, 422, 500] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration24_analytics_ocr.py:118: in test_ocr_scan_accepts_base64_image assert response.status_code in [200, 422, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 E assert 401 in [200, 422, 500] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
